recommendations.title: Shrek
recommendations.overview: It ain't easy bein' green -- especially if you're a likable (albeit smelly) ogre named Shrek. On a mission to retrieve a gorgeous princess from the clutches of a fire-breathing dragon, Shrek teams up with an unlikely compatriot -- a wisecracking donk

recommendations.title: Divorce Club
recommendations.overview: Ben is devastated when his wife asks for a divorce. While everyone chooses her side, Ben comes across Patrick, an old friend from college, recently divorced. Patrick invites him to crash at his place. The two roommates are soon joined by other divorc

recommendations.title: Thriller Night
recommendations.overview: A Shrek parody of Michael Jackson's Thriller song and music video, with Donkey singing.

recommendations.title: Shrek the Musical
recommendations.overview: Put out of his swamp solitude by a wicked tyrant's order, grumpy ogre Shrek goes on a journey – accompanied by a chatterbox donkey – to retrieve a beautiful princess from a tower, unaware that she has secrets all her own.

recommendations.title: Fatal
recommendations.overview: Fatal... short for Fatal Bazooka, a hardcore bling-bling rapper. A huge music star. Millions of fans, tons of hits, 4 Artist Of The Year Music Awards of Music, a fashion line, a magazine, and soon his own amusement park: Fataland. He is the undispute

recommendations.title: BDE
recommendations.overview: The story of four lifelong friends who met in the 2000s when they were presidents of the BDE of the Nantes Institute of Business. At the time, they were the "Bioman": the kings of partying, excess and "transmutation". 20 years later, they have mellow

recommendations.title: Vive la France
recommendations.overview: Muzafar and Feruz are two easy going shepherds from Taboulistan, a tiny country in Asia that is unknown to the rest of the world. To alert the world to his country’s existence, the son of Taboulistan’s president decides to instigate a program of publ

recommendations.title: Shrek 2
recommendations.overview: Happily ever after never seemed so far far away when a trip to meet the in-laws turns into a hilariously twisted adventure for Shrek and Fiona. With the help of his faithful Donkey, Shrek takes on a potion-brewing Fairy Godmother, the pompous Prince
recommendations.director: Conrad Vernon, Kelly Asbury, Andrew Adamson

recommendations.title: Scared Shrekless
recommendations.overview: Shrek challenges Donkey, Puss in Boots and his other fairy tale character friends to spend the night in Lord Farquaad's haunted castle, telling scary stories to see who can resist becoming scared and stay the longest.

recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.overview: A young cobra and his scorpion best friend go on a journey across the Sahara desert to save a new-found love.
